Title: User registration
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- Valid email: test@example.com
- Valid password: Test1234
- Valid name: Test User
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the email, password, and name.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered and redirected to the login page.

Title: Invalid email format
Preconditions: User is on the registration page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the invalid email, password, and name.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is unable to register.

Title: Empty password
Preconditions: User is on the registration page.
Test Data:
- Valid email: test@example.com
- Empty password
- Valid name: Test User
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the email, empty password, and name.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is unable to register.

Title: Generate report
Preconditions: User is logged in and has selected data to generate a report.
Test Data: - Selected data: Sales data for the last month
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Select the data to generate the report.
3. Click the "Generate Report" button.
Expected Result: The report is generated and displayed to the user.

Title: Invalid data selection
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the report generation page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Click the "Generate Report" button without selecting any data.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the report is not generated.

Title: Retrieve data
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the report generation page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Select the data to generate the report.
3. Click the "Generate Report" button.
Expected Result: The selected data is retrieved from the database and used to generate the report.

Title: Invalid data retrieval
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the report generation page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Select an invalid data type (e.g., "Users" instead of "Sales").
3. Click the "Generate Report" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the report is not generated.

Title: Display report
Preconditions: User is logged in and a report has been generated.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Generate a report.
3. Verify that the report is displayed correctly.
Expected Result: The report is displayed correctly on the web page.

Title: Incorrect report display
Preconditions: User is logged in and a report has been generated.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Generate a report.
3. Modify the report data (e.g., change the font size).
4. Verify that the modified report is displayed incorrectly.
Expected Result: The report is displayed incorrectly on the web page.

Title: Retrieve data from database
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the report generation page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Select the data to generate the report.
3. Click the "Generate Report" button.
Expected Result: The selected data is retrieved from the database and used to generate the report.

Title: Incorrect data retrieval
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the report generation page.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Select an invalid data type (e.g., "Users" instead of "Sales").
3. Click the "Generate Report" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the report is not generated.

Title: Successful login
Preconditions: User has registered an account.
Test Data:
- Valid email: test@example.com
- Valid password: Test1234
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the email and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Incorrect password
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Test Data:
- Valid email: test@example.com
- Incorrect password: Wrong1234
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the email and incorrect password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is unable to log in.

Title: Inactive account
Preconditions: User has an inactive account.
Test Data:
- Valid email: test@example.com
- Valid password: Test1234
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the email and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is unable to log in.

Title: View dashboard
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the dashboard page.
2. Verify that the user's information is displayed correctly.
Expected Result: The user's information is displayed correctly on the dashboard page.

Title: Incorrect user information
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the dashboard page.
2. Modify the user's information (e.g., change the name).
3. Verify that the modified information is displayed incorrectly.
Expected Result: The user's information is displayed incorrectly on the dashboard page.

Title: Generate report with valid data
Preconditions: User is logged in and has selected valid data to generate a report.
Test Data: - Selected data: Sales data for the last month
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Select the valid data to generate the report.
3. Click the "Generate Report" button.
Expected Result: The report is generated and displayed to the user.

Title: Generate report with invalid data
Preconditions: User is logged in and has selected invalid data to generate a report.
Test Data: - Selected data: Invalid data type (e.g., "Users" instead of "Sales")
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Select the invalid data to generate the report.
3. Click the "Generate Report" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the report is not generated.

Title: Generate report with missing data
Preconditions: User is logged in and has not selected any data to generate a report.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Click the "Generate Report" button without selecting any data.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the report is not generated.

Title: Edit report
Preconditions: User is logged in and has generated a report.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Generate a report.
3. Modify the report data (e.g., change the font size).
4. Click the "Save Changes" button.
Expected Result: The modified report is saved, and the updated report is displayed.

Title: Edit report with invalid data
Preconditions: User is logged in and has generated a report.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Generate a report.
3. Modify the report data with invalid data (e.g., negative values).
4. Click the "Save Changes" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the report is not updated.

Title: Delete report
Preconditions: User is logged in and has generated a report.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report generation page.
2. Generate a report.
3. Click the "Delete Report" button.
Expected Result: The report is deleted, and it is no longer visible to the user.

Title: Successful logout
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the logout page.
2. Click the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: Incorrect logout
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the logout page.
2. Click the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains logged in.
